title: About Us
description: n n Our Company is a business entity established in 1983. Mr. B.S. Sehgal is the Chairman-Emeritus . Mr. Gaurav Sehgal (Managing Director) looks after Operations of the Company. He is a fore-sighted person and share responsibilities in different functional areas and work with focused & target-oriented approach. He is Bachelor's in Engineering (Mechanical) from Thapar University & Master's in Business Administration (MBA-Finance) from Clark University, Massachusetts, United States of America . We are the largest manufacturers of Pliers and Adjustable Wrenches. Over the period of time with continuous dedication and teamwork, the company has expanded its product range with the development of sound infrastructure and strong business ties with its stakeholders. It is AN ISO 9001 Certified Company by TUV Rheinland of Germany. The Company uses exclusive quality raw materials to manufacture variety of Hand Tools. Our constant emphasis is on producing high quality and cost-competitive products in a safe and motivating work environment ensuring absolute trust in our brand PYE . The Company boasts of an established network of around 500 Authorized Dealers spread all across India, with a substantial share of revenues from overseas markets such as Middle East, Confederation of Independent States (CIS) and United States of America. Our company is awarded with ONE STAR EXPORT HOUSE status holder certificate by Government of India.nOur motto is to strive for excellence in all spheres through dedicated team work and technological up gradation while supporting the principle of continuous improvement. Increasing demand of PYE products is an indicator that our product quality has been approved by actual users in India as well as abroad. For more details, you may please visit us at http://www.pyetools.com n * Our Vision & Mission n * Our Core Values
